task_description: A 20-vehicle municipal delegation needs parking near latitude 34.05, longitude -118.24 today from 14:00 to 18:00 under user_id MUNI-DEL-01. A memo suggested Lot-101. Open lots include Lot-101 with 50 available spaces, Lot-202 with 80, and Lot-303 with 150. Historical data says Lot-101 was volatile: 10 spaces available at 12:00 and 80 at 13:00. Lot-202 was stable: 80 at 12:00 and 78 at 13:00. Choose exactly one option. Option A: check historical usage for multiple lots, choose a predictable lot, isolate delegation parking by closing or otherwise strictly partitioning the chosen lot, and create the 20-space reservation. Option B: anchor to the memo by reserving Lot-101 immediately without consulting historical usage, then reduce or cap public spaces on Lot-101 or an adjacent lot without considering alternative data. Answer with only A or B, followed by a brief reason.
